text:
Orau (オラーウ, Orāu) Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 372 is a high-ranking soldier in the Royal Army of the Kakin Empire, and one of the personal soldiers of Prince Benjamin. He is now among Prince Tyson's bodyguards under direct orders from Prince Benjamin. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 34, Chapter 358 

Appearance

Orau wears the standard Kakin military attire of a zipper jacket, pants, and dark combat boots. He wears an earpiece in his left ear.

Background

As one of the First Prince's soldiers, Orau graduated from Kakin's Royal Military Academy and became a part of his army. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 373 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Orau is among the other thirteen soldiers working under Prince Benjamin, that is present during Balsamilco's explanation before the journey's start. 

Later, Prince Benjamin orders his fourteen soldiers to both act as bodyguards and spies, to all the other princes, and to report any information regarding the Princes' Guardian Spirit Beasts and the Hunters' abilities. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 363 He is assigned to Prince Tyson and her Nen beast spawns takes no interest in him. 

When Tyson and her staff surprise Giuliano on his birthday, Orau can be seen behind them with his hands still held behind his back. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 389 

Abilities & Powers

Orau has received military training. 

Nen

Orau is a Nen user, although his superior Balsamilco believes him to be less knowledgeable than Hunters in that regard. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 364
